title: ranunculus sessilis
intro: Ranunculus sessilis, also known as Sessile Cress or Sessile Buttercup, is a floating aquatic plant that belongs to the Ranunculaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Ranunculus sessilis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues. Ranunculus sessilis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in salves and creams for topical application.
